name: Canal View
desc: Nikoli canal view logic puzzle - 30 levels

name: Catch the Cat
notes: Hex grid trap puzzle (Surround the Cat). BUG FOUND + FIXED: loadLevel/loadDaily was called BEFORE showScreen, causing resizeCanvas to run on display:none canvas-wrap → 0x0 canvas. Fixed via double-rAF defer pattern. Verified post-deploy: 500x500 canvas with pixels after clicking Play. G-012 h1 OK.

name: Kaero
notes: Nikoli letter-move logic puzzle, 30 levels (Beginner→Expert). All levels verified solvable via embedded solution + checkWin. Fixed footer/analytics 404 + keyboard typo.

name: Look-Air
desc: Nikoli Rukkuea square block logic puzzle - 30 levels 5x5-9x9

name: Pong
notes: Classic arcade tennis. BUG FOUND + FIXED: h1 was missing gz-sr-only class (was visible, breaking G-012 SEO/content standard). Fixed: added gz-sr-only + visible h2 with same text. Canvas renders, no localStorage (arcade game, no levels — persistence not required by GP-100).

name: Pyramid Solitaire
notes: Card game, DOM-based UI with canvas for table. Post-deploy: gc canvas 1280x577 renders green, buttons Undo/Hint/New/Daily/Stats/Awards/Next all present, pyr_stats localStorage key for persistence (GP-100 verified).

name: Rope Rescue
notes: Nikoli-style rope-wrap puzzle, 30 levels. Canvas renders after .btn-play click. G-012 h1 gz-sr-only verified, footer 7 links, ad div present.

name: Stacklands
notes: Card stacking village builder. 30 levels. Play flow: titleScreen→levelSelectScreen→gameScreen. Verified post-deploy: bgCanvas renders blue, gameScreen has 4 cards after level select.

name: Triplace
notes: Triomino division puzzle. 30 levels across 5 tiers. 5维度全过. Fixed missing #gz-ad-below-game (G-012).

name: Yajilin
notes: Nikoli arrow loop logic puzzle, 30 levels, 5x6 to 12x12

name: Trinudo
notes: Number-region logic puzzle. 30 levels across 5 tiers (4x4 Beginner → 8x8 Expert). 5维度全过. Each cell filled with 1/2/3, region size must equal number, no orthogonally-adjacent same-size regions. Verified L1, L5, L10, L15, L20, L25, L30 all solvable via embedded solution. Audio: BGM + SFX, AudioContext suspended until gesture. Persistence: trinudo_completed. Check button validates and triggers win modal. Local fix: added #gz-ad-below-game (G-012) — pending deploy.

name: Detour
notes: Turn-count loop puzzle. 30 levels across 5 tiers (5x6 → 8x10). 5维度全过. All cells need 2 connections forming single closed loop matching region turn-count clues. Verified ALL 30 levels solvable by mapping direction tuples [d1,d2] to edges via DR/DC arrays. Win modal + star rating + progress saved to detour_progress. Audio: 3 BGM nodes, musicOn. Local fix: added #gz-ad-below-game (G-012) — pending deploy.
